scope_note: QA Ellipsoid Slice Cert family [169]: certifies QA-style slicing of the WGS84 quantum ellipse. Latitude slices are circles with R²=N²·c_φ (rational in spreads). Meridian slices are ellipses with axis ratio √F/d. Conic discriminant I classifies each slice: I<0=ellipse (latitude circles), I=0=parabola (impossible on ellipsoid), I>0=hyperbola (impossible). Chromogeometric slicing: C-constant (green/area), F-constant (red/Minkowski), G-constant (blue/Euclidean) curves. Pisano-period lattice gives 24 equally-spaced longitude bands. Tier 1+2.
